resetPassword.subject: Reset Your HealEase Password
resetPassword.body: Use this verification code to reset your password: {{otp}}

html.intro: Use the code below to securely reset your HealEase password. This code can only be used once and is valid only for the device that requested it.
html.disclaimer: If you did not request a password reset, you can safely ignore this email. No changes have been made to your account.

confirmEmail.subject: Verify Your HealEase Email
confirmEmail.body: Use this verification code to verify your email address: {{otp}}

html.intro: Use the code below to verify your HealEase account and complete your sign up process. This code can only be used once and is valid only for the device that requested it.
html.disclaimer: If you did not create a HealEase account, you can safely ignore this email. Your account will remain inactive unless verified.

changeEmail.subject: Confirm Your New Email Address
changeEmail.body: Use this verification code to confirm your new email address: {{otp}}

html.intro: Use the code below to confirm your new email address for your HealEase account. This code can only be used once and is valid only for the device that requested it.
html.disclaimer: If you did not request this change, we recommend resetting your password to help keep your account secure.

shared.title: Your HealEase Verification Code
shared.heading: Here is your verification code.
shared.expiry: This code expires in 15 minutes. For your security, do not share it with anyone.
shared.footer: © 2026 HealEase · This email was sent because your email address was used for a HealEase request.

fallback.MOOD_DROP_ALERT: Your recent check ins suggest things may have felt a little heavier lately. Taking a moment to notice that pattern is already meaningful.
fallback.MOTIVATIONAL: Thank you for taking a moment to check in today. Consistency is built one small step at a time.
fallback.WEEKLY_SUMMARY: You made space this week to reflect on how things have been feeling. That consistency matters more than perfection.
fallback.BAD_DAY_SUPPORT: Today may feel a little harder than usual. Try to focus on what feels manageable right now.

progress.fallback: There is not enough data yet to identify patterns. Keep checking in to unlock personal insights over time.
